name: Type 055 Renhai-class Destroyer
description: China's most powerful surface combatant, classified by NATO as a cruiser. Features 112 vertical launch cells and advanced integrated radar, serving as the air defense commander for carrier battle groups.

specialAbilities.name: Area Air Defense Commander
specialAbilities.description: 112 VLS cells with HHQ-9 missiles provide layered fleet air defense over a wide area.

specialAbilities.name: Anti-Ship Missile Barrage
specialAbilities.description: YJ-18 anti-ship cruise missiles enable saturation attacks against enemy surface combatants.
